## What

One-sentence description of the change.

## Why

Link to issue or one-paragraph motivation.

## How tested

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] Manual smoke test: `python server.py`, opened browser, sent a prompt, saw expected output

## Checklist

- [ ] One feature per PR (no refactor + feature mixed)
- [ ] No new top-level dependencies (or justified in description)
- [ ] README / ARCHITECTURE / docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Tests added for new code paths
